copy.description:
Brookline School Committee Meeting - June 18, 2026

During the Brookline School Committee Meeting on June 18, 2026, a retirement celebration for several members of the school community, including Elizabeth Hendrickson, was acknowledged, with performance recognition and expressions of gratitude for their service, particularly regarding the METCO program [17:16][127:35].
